item_text: Overall, how satisfied or dissatisfied are you with [Organization] as an employer?
value_labels: 1=Very dissatisfied;2=Dissatisfied;3=Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied;4=Satisfied;5=Very satisfied
notes: Asked before the GAP matrix; headline trend metric

item_text: Most days, my work gives me more energy than it takes.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Item order fixed across waves

item_text: I am proud to tell people where I work.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Item order fixed across waves

item_text: My work gives me a real sense of accomplishment.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Item order fixed across waves

item_text: When my team needs extra effort, I am willing to give it.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Item order fixed across waves

item_text: I can see a future for myself at this organization.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Item order fixed across waves

item_text: I care about what this organization is trying to achieve.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree

item_text: How likely are you to recommend [Organization] as a place to work to a friend or colleague?
value_labels: 0=Not at all likely;...;10=Extremely likely
notes: 0-10 only; cutoffs 9-10 promoter / 0-6 detractor defined on this scale

item_text: What is the main reason for your score?
notes: Thematic coding; cross-tabbed by promoter class

item_text: Realized randomized display order of the 18 categories
notes: Comma-separated codes; required to test order effects between waves

item_text: By the end of a typical workday, I have little energy left for anything else.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Aggregate reporting only, N>=5

item_text: Evenings, weekends, and vacations are enough for me to recover from work.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Reversal applied at scoring only (x_r = 6 - x); scale never flipped on screen

item_text: I find it harder to get interested in my work than I used to.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Aggregate reporting only, N>=5

item_text: My current workload is sustainable for the long term.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Reversal applied at scoring only (x_r = 6 - x); scale never flipped on screen

item_text: I feel increasingly detached from what happens in this organization.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Aggregate reporting only, N>=5

item_text: In the past month, work stress has affected my sleep or health.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Aggregate reporting only, N>=5

item_text: I expect to still be working at this organization twelve months from now.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Primary criterion for the driver model

item_text: In the past six months, I have seriously considered leaving.
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Reported separately; not summed with STY-01

item_text: Which best describes your current plans?
value_labels: 1=Planning to stay;2=Open to outside offers;3=Actively looking;98=Prefer not to say
notes: Only item with an explicit refusal option; refusal rate reported

item_text: What is the single most important thing this organization could change to make it a better place to work?
notes: Dual-coder thematic coding with adjudication

item_text: What should this organization be careful NOT to change?
notes: Source of 'keep' themes

item_text: (need-specific slot; omitted in standard census)
notes: Activated per engagement

item_text: How long have you worked at [Organization]?
value_labels: 1=Less than 1 year;2=1-2 years;3=3-6 years;4=7 years or more
notes: Non-overlapping by construction (owner decision 2026-07-19); HRIS extract must be re-banded to match

item_text: Which best describes your area?
value_labels: client-specific; mirrors HRIS department list;98=Prefer not to say
notes: Must match HRIS exactly or weighting cannot be executed as specified

item_text: Which best describes your role level?
value_labels: 1=Individual contributor;2=Team lead/supervisor;3=Manager;4=Senior leadership;98=Prefer not to say

item_text: Which site do you work at most of the time?
value_labels: client-specific;98=Prefer not to say

item_text: Which age group are you in?
value_labels: 1=Under 25;2=25-34;3=35-44;4=45-54;5=55 or older;98=Prefer not to say

item_text: Do you regularly care for children or another dependent?
value_labels: 1=Yes;2=No;98=Prefer not to say
notes: Optional per engagement

item_text: What is the highest level of education you have completed?
value_labels: client-specific;98=Prefer not to say
notes: Optional per engagement

item_text: Attention check (GAP screen 2, satisfaction column)
value_labels: 1=Very dissatisfied;2=Dissatisfied;3=Somewhat dissatisfied;4=Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied;5=Somewhat satisfied;6=Satisfied;7=Very satisfied;99=Not applicable (off-scale)
notes: Pass = 'Satisfied' (6). One failure flags; two exclude

item_text: Attention check (BRN matrix, row 4)
value_labels: 1=Strongly disagree;2=Disagree;3=Neither agree nor disagree;4=Agree;5=Strongly agree
notes: Pass = 'Agree' (4). One failure flags; two exclude

item_text: Total completion time
notes: Speeder screen: < 1/3 of sample median flags

item_text: Page-level time per screen
notes: Sustained < 2 s per item excludes

item_text: Device type
value_labels: 1=desktop;2=mobile;3=tablet;4=kiosk
notes: Kiosk duplicates expected by design; never used for identification

item_text: Invitation channel
value_labels: 1=link;2=QR;3=kiosk

item_text: Engagement index, 0-100
notes: Computed if >=4 of 6 answered

item_text: Burnout index, 6-30
value_labels: sum(BRN-01, BRN-02r, BRN-03, BRN-04r, BRN-05, BRN-06)
notes: Computed if >=5 of 6 answered

item_text: Burnout risk tier
value_labels: 6-13=Low;14-21=Moderate;22-30=Elevated
notes: Pre-set cutpoints, not sample terciles; disclosed

item_text: Promoter class
value_labels: 0-6=Detractor;7-8=Passive;9-10=Promoter

item_text: Employee Net Promoter Score, pp
value_labels: %Promoters - %Detractors
notes: Mean of NPS-01 is a secondary statistic only

item_text: Gap score per category
value_labels: mean(GAP-<CODE>-I) - mean(GAP-<CODE>-S)
notes: Satisfaction mean excludes 99

item_text: Coverage per category
value_labels: % answering 99 on GAP-<CODE>-S
notes: Reported with every satisfaction mean

item_text: Within-survey median importance
value_labels: median of the 18 importance means
notes: Defines GAP quadrant boundary; recomputed each wave

item_text: Within-survey median satisfaction
value_labels: median of the 18 satisfaction means
notes: Defines GAP quadrant boundary; recomputed each wave

item_text: Payroll weight
value_labels: rim weighting on department x tenure x role
notes: Trimmed 0.4-2.5; design effect reported
